transcript.text: Hello, Zookeeper Review.
I know a lot of people thought Zookeeper was kind of cheesy, and somebody even commented on my V-log yesterday,
Because I mentioned that I rented the movie, that they thought it was stupid, and it should have gone straight to DVD, but...
Um, I loved Zookeeper, dude!
One of my favorite movies of the whole year. I thought it was so funny, dude.
It's about all the animals who can talk to the dude, you know, and I know it's kind of a played-out idea, you know,
Where you had Babe with the little moving lips and the talking animals, and, you know, Dr. Dolittle, and I guess a lot of them lately,
But this one was, I like this one because, because it was just really funny, like, all the interaction that the animals had with each other,
And, like, the bearers, like, you know, I'm Alpha Bear, even though I'm smaller than you,
And Adam Sandler as the monkey was really funny.
Um, I thought it was Gilbert Gottfried, but it was Adam Sandler.
Um, and, um, and, uh, yeah, all the animals, like the gorilla, Nick Nolte as the gorilla, um,
And, uh, yeah, kind of, I love movies that anthropomorphize, if that's the right word, humanize animals,
Because I think animals are kind of like people, you know, like, you can actually, you can see facial expressions in animals,
You can see if, especially dogs, you know, you can see if they're happy or sad just by looking at the facial.
They have the same ones, you know, they're like, you know, and the same thing with cats, and, um,
But I think they're all like that, you know, even, you got, I think you can even see smiles and horses, you know,
At least, I mean, and then your, your other eyes and stuff, so.
Um, yeah, so it was, uh, it was cool.
I'd like to see the new, uh, Rise of the Apes movie, um, but, um, but, uh, yeah,
And I think Kevin James did a really good job, too, is, like, just being, like, you know, playing the nice guy, you know,
Not overacting and just, um, yeah, um, I don't know why people didn't like it.
I guess they just were sick of that kind of a movie, but I thought it was awesome,
And I was really entertained by it.
Okay.
